recurring.title: Recurring Invoices
recurring.selectCompany: Select an active company to view recurring templates.

states.emptyNone: No recurring templates. Create one with the “New template” button to issue invoices automatically on a schedule.
states.emptyFiltered: No records match the applied filters.

banner.part1: Recurring invoices are generated automatically as
banner.part3: enabled, the generated invoice is submitted automatically to ANAF (per-template setting).

modal.sub: The invoice is generated automatically as a draft on the scheduled date.
modal.name: Template name
modal.clientLocked: The client cannot be changed after creation.
modal.autoSubmit: Submit automatically to ANAF after issuing
modal.tip: You can also create a template directly from an existing invoice, via the “Save as template” option.

validate.name: Enter a template name.
validate.lines: Add at least one line item.
validate.lineName: Line {{n}}: the product/service name is required.

notify.createError: Could not create the recurring template.
notify.updateError: Could not update the recurring template.
notify.toggleError: Could not update the template status.
notify.autoAnafError: Could not update the Auto ANAF setting.
